sourceTitle: AI and Generative Technology Use at CUIMC
evidenceSnippetOriginal: For locally installed AI models (i.e. LLM, NLP, ML), a formal IT Risk Assessment review is required before deployment to evaluate potential security, privacy, and compliance risks.
